---
title: "Teaching and Mentoring"
format: html
---
## Courses Taught

Intermediate Analysis II (MAT 127B, Summer 2025, UC Davis)
Vector Analysis (MAT 21D, Summer 2024, UC Davis)
Vector Analysis (MAT 21D, Summer 2023, UC Davis)
Calculus: Partial Derivatives and Series (MAT 21C, Summer 2022, UC Davis)
Modern Physics Labratory (PHYS 20CL, Summer 2021, UCSB)
Modern Physics Labratory (PHYS 20CL, Summer 2020, UCSB)

## Teaching Assistant
Precalculus, Calculus I-IV, Calculus for Biology and Medicine II-III,  Introduction to Abstract Mathematics, Graduate Analysis II, Astronomy.  

## Mentorship
